ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analogies" (
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analogy */,
  "analogy_text" TEXT /* Text representation of the analogy */,
  "analogy_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analogy type (e.g., unary, binary) */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the analogy (e.g., 2x2, 3x3) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the analogy (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analogy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analogy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analogy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogies_analogy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_type_id") REFERENCES analogy_types ("analogy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_types" (
  "analogy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analogy type */,
  "analogy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the analogy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analogy type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analogy type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analogy type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analogy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responding */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's response */,
  "correctness" INTEGER /* Correctness of the user's response (True/False) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_responses_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being scored */,
  "num_hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits (attempts) for the analogy */,
  "correctly_answered" INTEGER /* Number of correct responses */,
  "incorrectly_answered" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect responses */,
  "correct_ratio" REAL /* Correct-to-incorrect response ratio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_scores_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, respondent) */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Skill level of the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_tags_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_categories_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analogy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the analogy was completed */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the user on the analogy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analogy_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analogy_history_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being collaborated on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_comments_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analogy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analogy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analogy being reported on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analogy_reports_analogy_id FOREIGN KEY ("analogy_id") REFERENCES analogies ("analogy_id")
)
